name: robot
description: skillos_robot ISA cartridge for the orchestrator. Navigation, perception, motor control, and speech I/O. The 20Hz reactive loop, reflex guard, and ESP32 firmware stay onboard; the orchestrator calls these methods as a high-level brain.

transport.note: Orchestrator calls methods in-process via cartridge/methods.ts, no WebSocket

navigate.summary: Move the robot to a goal expressed in natural language or coordinates. Returns plan immediately; use <|wait|>fd=3 to block until arrival or stuck.

observe.summary: Return current SceneGraph snapshot (objects, positions, distances).

describe.summary: Return a natural-language description of the current view.

stop.summary: Emergency stop. Robot halts within reflex-guard latency (<50ms).

set_speed.summary: Cap motor speed (e.g., for tight environments).

speak.summary: Speak text aloud to the user via TTS (or print to console).
opcodes: <|call|>robot.speak {"text":"Hello! How can I help you today?"}<|/call|>

listen.summary: Listen for user speech via STT (or read from stdin). Returns transcribed text.

io_ports.fd=4: Microphone input (alternative to robot.listen). <|read|>fd=4 len=1 reads one utterance.
io_ports.fd=5: Speaker output (alternative to robot.speak). <|write|>fd=5 {"text":"hello"} speaks text.
